items.title: Welcome — from Kael Torchlight
items.summary: Kael's standing message to any new walker: 'The vault is open. The drinks are not free, but the conversation is. Bring an idea worth carrying.'

items.title: Morning Brief — Concordia
items.summary: Today's dome temperature, refusal-field strength, southern-arc status, plaza activity. A standing daily brief from the Refusal Keep.

items.title: Captain Ren — A Quiet Conversation
items.summary: Captain Ren Solare invites you to walk the southern arc with her at dawn. Standing offer; she's there every Stratus phase.

items.title: Velka — Bazaar Welcome
items.summary: Velka Ironhand's standing welcome to the Concordant Bazaar. 'Come look at the stalls. Buy nothing. Watch what sells. Then come back.'
